failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: rolling train-only supervised stump-rank ensemble selecting directional intraday US100 M5 candidates by score-conditioned schedule
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0002 work must change a meaningful model, feature, label, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0004 by only nudging stump count, quantiles, or daily top-N selection
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds were losing and total fold-isolated tick net PnL was negative despite active-day entry frequency near the target range

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar logic parity passed exactly, but tick execution worsened total net PnL by 13.90 and reduced trade count by 14; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Increasing active-day entry frequency with a transparent stump rank ensemble did not rescue edge quality; all folds lost in MT5 tick mode.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether a rolling train-only supervised decision-stump rank ensemble can select directional US100 M5 candidates at the target active-day entry frequency without freezing the model family
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: fourth C0002 true variant; changes the score model from linear and cell surfaces to a transparent supervised stump ensemble using direction-aware features, not a threshold, window, SLTP, or retry nudge

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
proxy must fit stump rank models only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report score diagnostics with applies true
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, and lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

feature.summary: direction-aware closed-bar return, body, close-position, volatility-context, and session-position features; no feature set selected

label.summary: train-only directional target-before-stop plus forward path quality label over a 12-bar closed-bar horizon; no label selected

model.summary: rolling train-only transparent decision-stump rank ensemble over direction-aware features; no model family or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: evaluate both long and short candidates per eligible closed bar, rank by stump ensemble score, choose one direction per bar, and take up to eight entries per active day with fixed-lot stop-target-max-hold paths
